Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine buses Temporary Reroute at Garfield/Racine
ShortDescription: #44 Wallace/Racine buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to construction near Garfield/Racine.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#44 Wallace/Racine buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Racine, 59th, Halsted, 51st, and Racine over their regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Garfield/Racine.

Headline: Loop-bound Orange Line Delays
ShortDescription: Loop-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier signal problem at Midway. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Loop-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier signal problem at Midway. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
